case_title: JOHNY CORNEJO VS. TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORNEJO, JOHNY AS TO DEFENDANT TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DA SILVA, VIRGINIA P. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SILVA, TULIO C. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNEJO, JOHNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DA SILVA, VIRGINIA P. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SILVA, TULIO C. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $19,099.07 PRINCIPAL, $145.42 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,614.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
